en: Yeah. / Right.
That's true. / True.
notes: "True." 一語でカジュアルに同意

en: Same here. / I feel the same way.
notes: "Same." だけでもカジュアルに通じる

en: I think so too.
I think that works. / Sounds good.
notes: "Sounds good." は万能の同意表現

en: I don't think that's right.
Not quite. / Not exactly.
I can't agree with that. / I can't get behind that.
I agree on that point.
notes: "on that point" で部分的同意を明示

en: But not entirely. / But not everything.
I mostly agree. / I agree in principle.
I see your point to some extent.
That's a bit much. / I can't do that.
notes: "a bit much" =「ちょっと無理がある」

en: In that case, sure. / That works.
That makes sense then.
notes: "then" を付けると「それなら」の条件付き感が出る

jp: その言い方なら受け入れやすい。
en: I can work with that. / If you put it that way.
notes: "I can work with that." =「それなら受け入れられる」

en: As is, that's tough. / That's hard to accept as is.

jp: それはわかるけど、私は嫌かな。
en: I get it, but it's not for me.
notes: "not for me" で個人の好みとして柔らかく断る

en: I won't object to that. / I'm fine with that.
notes: "I won't object" はやや堅い。"I'm fine with that." が自然

jp: そこまでではないと思う。
en: I don't think it's that extreme.
That's a bit extreme.
notes: "a bit" で断定を和らげる

en: Yeah, let's go with that.
No, actually, I changed my mind.

jp: 今回はあなたに合わせる。
en: I'll go along with you this time.

jp: 今回は見送ったほうがいい。
en: I think we should pass on this one.
I like that idea better.
Under those conditions, sure. / If that's the deal, I'm in.

jp: それはちょっと引っかかる。
en: Something about that doesn't sit right.
No objections. / I have no issue with that.
notes: "No objections." はフォーマル寄り

en: I can accept that. / That's reasonable.
I don't fully agree.

jp: 反対というほどではない。
en: I wouldn't say I'm against it.
notes: "I wouldn't say" =「〜とまでは言わない」

jp: その気持ちは否定できない。
en: I can't deny that feeling. / I get that.
I'd rather not decide right now.
notes: "I'd rather not" =「できれば〜したくない」

en: Let's skip this one. / Let's not this time.

jp: それはさすがにやりすぎ。
en: That's definitely too much. / That's going overboard.
I can't budge on that. / That's non-negotiable.
notes: "budge" =「譲歩する」。"non-negotiable" はビジネスでも使う

en: I don't really care about that part. / That's fine either way.
